hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qiE 'dotnet\s+test'; then if tasklist /fi "imagename eq dotnet.exe" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "dotnet.exe"; then echo 'BLOCKED: A dotnet process is already running. You MUST wait for it to complete before starting another dotnet test. Running multiple test processes simultaneously causes memory exhaustion (2GB+ each) and crashes the system.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

powershell -Command "[void][System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); \$n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; \$n.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code'; \$n.BalloonTipText = 'Needs your attention'; \$n.Visible = \$true; \$n.ShowBalloonTip(5000); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; \$n.Dispose()"

echo '--- Post-Compaction Context Reminder ---'; echo 'CONSTRAINT: Never run multiple dotnet test processes simultaneously (2GB+ each, causes OOM crashes)'; echo 'WORKFLOW: TDD pattern — @test-writer (write + verify tests fail) → @coder (implement) → @verifier (confirm pass)'; echo 'TESTING: xUnit + FluentAssertions v7 + NSubstitute. Repos=Singleton, Services=Scoped.'; echo '--- End Context ---'
> .claude/hooks/tdd-session-state.txt 2>/dev/null; echo 'TDD session state reset — tests must be written before implementation.'

input=$(cat); ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); prompt=$(echo "$input" | sed -n 's/.*"prompt" *: *"\([^"]*\).*/\1/p' | head -1 | cut -c1-120); if [ -n "$prompt" ]; then echo "[$ts] $prompt" >> .claude/prompt-log.txt 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
